00000006831845868630.title: Brother TN-431 Cyan/Magenta/Yellow Standard Yield Toner Cartridge, 3/Pack (TN4313PK)

paragraph: Delivering professional, vivid prints with 1800-page yield*, Brother TN-431 3PK genuine standard-yield color toner cartridges are intelligently engineered to work seamlessly with Brother printers for consistent results. Pack includes one each of cyan toner, yellow toner, and magenta toner.
bullets: Compatible with Brother HL-L8260CDW, HL-L8360CDW, HL-L8360CDWMT, HL-L8360CDWT, MFC-L8610CDW, MFC-L8900CDW
Brother Genuine TN4313PK Standard-Yield 3 Pack Color Ink Cartridges – includes 1 Cyan, 1 Magenta and 1 Yellow Cartridge.
Page Yield of up to 1,800 pages* per cartridge.
Brother Genuine toner produces superior quality results that withstand the test of time
Brother offers an environmentally responsible way to dispose of Brother Genuine cartridges
Disclaimers: *Approximate cartridge yield in accordance with ISO/IEC 19798 (letter/A4).
headliner: Using Brother multi-pack toner helps cut down on the frequency of replacement orders and offers a convenient way to always have replacement toner on hand.

00000006831845868647.title: CloroxPro Clorox Disinfecting Wipes, Fresh Scent, 75 Wipes/Container (15949)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These sanitizing wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria**; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria** and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: DIRECTIONS FOR USE: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients: Active ingredients: n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Caution Statement: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

00000006831845868647.skuDescription: CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes Fresh Scent 75 Count 15949

00000006831845868647.title: CloroxPro Clorox Disinfecting Wipes, Fresh Scent, 75 Wipes/Container (15949)

paragraph: Clorox Disinfecting Wipes clean and disinfect in one easy step*. These sanitizing wipes are EPA-registered to kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds. They also remove common allergens like pet dander, pollen particles and grass. One antibacterial wipe can kill 99.9% of bacteria** in just 10 seconds. In addition, these wipes meet EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on hard nonporous surfaces. The premoistened, textured wipes are suitable for a variety of surfaces including acrylic, glass and vinyl. Use on germ hot spots such as doorknobs, handrails and faucets. Ideal for offices, daycares, schools, hotels, restaurants and more. *When used according to disinfection directions. **Bacteria: Campylobacter jejuni, Escherichia coli O157:H7 (E. coli), Klebsiella pneumoniae (Kleb), Methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA), Salmonella enterica (Salmonella), Staphylococcus aureus (Staph), Streptococcus pyogenes (Strep).
bullets: DISINFECTING WIPES: EPA registered to kill 99.9% of viruses and bacteria**; Meets EPA criteria for use against SARS-CoV-2, the virus that causes COVID-19, on non-porous surfaces
VERSITILE CLEANING WIPE: Create clean public spaces with these wet wipes that breakdown grease, soap scum and grime so you can tackle messes on a variety of surfaces, bleach-free
ALL PURPOSE WIPE: Quickly sanitizes bacteria** and kills most viruses in as little as 15 seconds; removes common allergens and deodorizes, preventing the odor causing bacteria for up to 24 hours
MULTI-SURFACE DISINFECTANT AND SANITIZER: Germs occur on more than breakroom and restroom surfaces; safely wipe down desks, remotes, doorknobs or clean up spills
GREAT FOR COMMERCIAL USE: Ideal for use in offices, day care centers, schools, hotels, restaurants and other commercial facilities; CloroxPro, where clean means everything
Safety Data Sheet
headliner: Clean and disinfect all in one swipe* with CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes that kill 99.9% of germs including cold and flu viruses* in 15 seconds.
expandedDescr:
Usage Directions: DIRECTIONS FOR USE: It is a violation of Federal law to use this product in a manner inconsistent with its labeling. Not for cleaning or sanitizing skin. Do not use as a diaper wipe or for personal cleansing. These wipes will not harm most surfaces, including acrylic, fiberglass and vinyl. Not recommended for use on unpainted wood. For surfaces that may come in contact with food, a potable water rinse is required. Do not use on glasses, dishes or utensils. Do not use to disinfect appliances, refrigerator interiors and microwave oven interiors.

Ingredients: Active ingredients: n-Alkyl (C14 60%, C16 30%, C12 5%, C18 5%) Dimethyl Benzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, n-Alkyl (C12 68%, C14 32%) Dimethyl Ethylbenzyl Ammonium Chloride 0.184%*, other ingredients 99.632%. *Does not include weight of dry wipe.

Caution Statement: CAUTION: Causes moderate eye irritation. Avoid contact with eyes or clothing. Wash thoroughly with soap and water after handling and before eating, drinking, chewing gum, using tobacco or using the toilet. Wear gloves for prolonged or frequent use. FIRST AID: IF IN EYES: Hold eye open and rinse slowly and gently with water for 15-20 minutes. Remove contact lenses, if present, after the first 5 minutes, then continue rinsing eye. Call a poison control center or doctor for further treatment advice.

00000006831845868647.skuDescription: CloroxPro Disinfecting Wipes Fresh Scent 75 Count 15949
